summary: Replayed ADR 0263 from the synchronized 0.177.87 mainline worktree by converging the governed rag-context wrapper on docker-runtime-lv3, reapplying the ServerClaw memory schema and corpus mirrors, building the platform-context API with the role-managed host-network classic-builder path, and re-verifying cited context retrieval plus semantic-and-keyword memory recall through both the role and the external operator CLI.

verification.check: Focused ADR 0263 regression coverage on the synchronized mainline head
verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest tests/test_rag_context_runtime_role.py tests/test_generate_platform_vars.py -q` returned `31 passed in 1.24s` on commit `7fe9af77cf7b842884533dde6b2b1af64857fe0d` after the latest origin/main merge.

verification.check: Rag-context syntax and repo gate verification on the synchronized head
verification.observed: `ansible-playbook -i inventory/hosts.yml playbooks/services/rag-context.yml --syntax-check --private-key .local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 -e proxmox_guest_ssh_connection_mode=proxmox_host_jump` passed, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh data-models workstream-surfaces agent-standards` passed after the ADR 0263 ownership metadata refresh, and `make check-canonical-truth` returned `Canonical truth OK`.

verification.check: Exact-main ADR 0263 replay from the synchronized 0.177.87 branch head
verification.observed: `ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=rag-context env=production` succeeded with `LV3_RUN_ID=e6fa9fca7a534939928bc8c0938756b2`, ansible scope run id `9e8dcfe46d20419fb39c464891acd29c`, trace id `3a088906b6a84a9bae17eb26dac49daf`, and final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=119 changed=19 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=21` plus `proxmox-host : ok=42 changed=7 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=15`.

verification.check: External health and operator CLI memory smoke after the exact-main replay
verification.observed: `curl -sf http://100.64.0.1:8010/healthz` returned `{"status":"ok","collection":"platform_context","memory_collection":"serverclaw_memory","memory_enabled":true}`; `uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/lv3_cli.py query-platform-context "what retrieval backend is active for platform context" --json` returned a cited first match at `docs/adr/0198-qdrant-vector-search-semantic-rag.md`; and a CLI create/query/delete smoke cycle for memory id `1f03ab41-1e97-4537-896e-4e7bd3ae2693` confirmed `matched_backends` `keyword` and `semantic` before deletion.

notes: This receipt is the canonical exact-main live-apply proof for ADR 0263 and supports the first platform-version bump where the ServerClaw memory substrate becomes true on main.

The final successful replay came after earlier branch-local failures exposed three real defects: missing `script_bootstrap.py` packaging inside the image, reliance on `docker compose up --build` despite Docker bridge drift on docker-runtime-lv3, and stale compose-network recovery requirements for local Ollama.

The current governed path intentionally skips the full inline mirrored-corpus rebuild during production live apply; use `python3 scripts/index_platform_knowledge.py --api-url http://100.64.0.1:8010 --api-token-file .local/platform-context/api-token.txt` as the explicit maintenance rebuild when a full corpus refresh is required.
